title: No Netherite Upgrade? Not today
description: Now you can convert diamond tools and armour without using the netherite upgrade item
body:
⚒️ No Netherite Upgrade? Not Today
This datapack restores the classic upgrade path, letting players craft Netherite tools and armor directly with Diamond gear and Netherite Ingots.

✨ Features  
✅ Shapeless recipes for all Netherite tools and armor (recipe in the gallery)
✅ You can still use the smithing template but not necessary
🧩 Lore late game integration with the nether 
🔁 Modular JSON structure for easy editing and expansion  
🛠️ Compatible with Minecraft 1.21+
